notes: Example annotation config. Shows how to guide a user through the Binance registration form. 3 annotations: focus on email field → arrow → callout.

annotations._note: Blur any pre-filled email if screenshot was taken on a real account
Step 1 badge on the left edge of the email field
Arrow pointing down toward the email field from the callout
Callout below the arrow — tells user what to do

aiCandidates._note: AI suggested also highlighting the password field — not yet approved
